_note: The live database connection AND the Auth0 Domain/Audience (for inbound JWT validation, see auth0.rs) are both read at runtime from ~/.jumptest.json by the common Config loader -- add an 'auth0': {'domain': ..., 'audience': ...} section there, not here. This file plays no part in Auth0 configuration; it exists only for parity with the .NET appsettings.json layout. The API binds to the first free port in 5200-5300.
